label: Furniture
description: Place standard-sized furniture symbols into your drawing, grouped by room: Beds (single/double/queen/king, nightstand, wardrobe), Bath (toilet, sinks, bathtub, shower), Living (sofa, loveseat, armchair, coffee table, TV unit), Dining (4- and 6-seat tables), Kitchen (range, fridge, sink, island), and Laundry (washer, dryer, water heater). Click in the viewport to place the chosen piece, drag it to reposition, drag the rotate handle to spin it, and press Delete/Backspace to remove a selected piece. Sized in real-world meters at the same Screen Units / Meter scale as the Floorplan node so everything lines up.
